results.title: Symbotic acquires ARMS Innovations to integrate operational intelligence software into its warehouse automation systems
results.description: Symbotic acquired ARMS Innovations on July 2, 2026, for its operational intelligence software. It coordinates automated systems and human workers in distribution centers.

results.title: Flying Cars? Not Yet. Flying Taxis? Toyota Thinks So
results.description: Toyota and Joby create a manufacturing partnership to prepare for commercial eVTOL production

results.title: New Car Prices Hit Record High—And Buyers Keep Buying
results.description: The average new vehicle now costs nearly $52,000, yet demand remains strong as shoppers shift toward smaller, more fuel-efficient models

results.title: McMurtry Spéirling Pure Enters Production with 1.55-Second 0-60 Time
results.description: The record-setting electric fan car packs 1,000 hp, 4,400 pounds of downforce, and a $1.3 million price tag.

results.title: America’s Fastest-Growing EV State Isn’t California—Not by a Long Shot
results.description: New data shows electric vehicle adoption is increasingly driven by state policies, electricity prices and charging access—not federal incentives
